rawFields.title: Amazon Basics Portable Travel Window Blackout Curtain Shades with Suction Cups - Dark Grey, 1-Pack
rawFields.sku_description:
"100% Polyester
Imported
ENERGY SAVING: These blackout curtains act as an insulating barrier by blocking sunlight
NOISE REDUCTION: Portable blackout curtains can be used to reduce outside noise
CUSTOMIZABLE FIT: Velcro tabs allow you to adjust the dimensions of these blackout curtains to fit various window sizes
EASY TO CLEAN: Made from 100% polyester, these blackout curtains are machine washable in cold water. Line dry
PORTABLE CONVENIENCE: Travel in comfort with the included travel bag. Attached suction cups allow for mounting these blackout shades on smooth glass surfaces"
